skills.title: Machine Learning & AI
skills.description: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-Learn, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib

skills.title: LLMs & Generative AI
skills.description: Large Language Models (LLMs), LangChain, LangGraph, Hugging Face, Llama 3, GPT‑4, Groq API, RAG, prompt engineering, embeddings, vector DBs (FAISS, AstraDB).

skills.title: MLOps & DevOps
skills.description: Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines, Jenkins, model deployment, model serving, monitoring, model registry, experiment tracking, A/B testing.

skills.title: Backend & APIs
skills.description: FastAPI, Flask, REST APIs, microservices architecture, Celery, WebSockets

skills.title: Databases & Data Engineering
skills.description: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AstraDB, ETL pipelines, data preprocessing, data transformation, schema validation.

skills.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
skills.description: AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run), HPC platforms, distributed training, GPU clusters

skills.title: Monitoring & Observability
skills.description: Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging, latency optimization, model drift monitoring, system performance metrics.

portfolio.title: Flipkart-Style Product Recommender Chatbot
bullets: Stateful e-commerce conversational AI with using RAG and semantic search.
End-to-end data pipeline: CSV ingestion, HuggingFace BGE embeddings and AstraDB vector store with metadata filtering.
Docker multi-stage builds,  microservices on GCP Kubernetes Engine and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.

portfolio.title: Stateful Agentic AI System with LangGraph & Llama 3
bullets: Multi-agent LLM system via LangGraph checkpointing and stateful orchestration.
Three specialized agents: conversational chatbot, tool-augmented coding assistant, and AI news aggregation DAG.
Llama 3 and Groq API for fast inference

portfolio.title: Network Security - Malicious URL Detection MLOps Pipeline
bullets: End-to-end ETL workflow ML pipeline for malicious URL classification
MLflow on DagsHub for experiment tracking, and versioned artifacts on AWS S3.

portfolio.title: ThyroCheck AI - Thyroid Cancer Detection with Explainable AI
bullets: FibonacciNet CNN in TensorFlow/Keras for thyroid nodule image classification
FastAPI backend with React & Streamlit frontends for automatic report generation

education.thesis: Optimizing Small Object Detection for Autonomous Vehicles in Dense Natural Environments
courses: Applications of Machine Learning & Data Science

education.description: Completed all CEFR levels from A1 to B2 to prepare for studying and working in Germany; now use German daily in professional contexts.
Built a strong foundation in mathematics, dynamics and control, which later supported my transition into AI and data-driven engineering.

workExperience.title: AI Research Assistant
workExperience.description: EV charging machine learning forecasting service for energy grid management.
achievements: Architected and deployed a production-level time-series forecasting service with full ETL, feature engineering and model pipeline.
Built a Dockerized REST API with Celery and Redis for distributed inference, enabling low-latency predictions at scale.
Implemented model monitoring with Prometheus & Grafana, tracking latency, system metrics and model drift in production.
Improved forecasting accuracy to ~90%, reduced data noise by 34% and increased model reliability by 18%.

workExperience.title: Master Thesis Student
workExperience.description: Optimizing small object detection for autonomous vehicles in dense natural environments.
achievements: Designed a modular PyTorch-based computer vision framework with 8 phase-wise model configurations.
Improved real-time object detection mAP by 2.6 points via YOLOv5/YOLOv8 improvements and hyperparameter tuning.
Leveraged HPC Linux clusters for distributed training and large-scale experiments.
Benchmarked models for real-time deployment, analysing latency and throughput trade-offs.

workExperience.title: Data Science Intern
workExperience.company: Continental Tires Deutschland GmbH, Hannover, Germany
workExperience.description: Data-driven quality control in industrial tire apex manufacturing.
achievements: Developed and deployed regression models for anomaly detection on time-series sensor data in tire manufacturing.
Engineered features that improved defect identification by 25% and reduced false positives.
Built a Flask + HTML/CSS based defect detection tool for process and quality control teams.
Collaborated with domain experts to translate manufacturing requirements into ML features and KPIs.
